description: Use Cobra for CLI commands and argument parsing.
Use CUE as the configuration source of truth.
Prefer early returns and guard clauses for errors.
Use small structs to avoid long parameter lists.
Replace boolean soup with named predicates.
Guarantee deterministic ordering in generated outputs.
Use JSON for request and response payloads.
Prefer formats that are well supported across languages, especially Go, TypeScript, and Dart.
Keep `options` as lightweight representations of argument parsing, limited to a safe format.
Build the CLI for at least Linux and macOS.
